//: ailocal — VS Code Continue config. MANAGED FILE — deployed to ~/.continue/config.json
by scripts/install-clients.sh (vscode target); __LITELLM_KEY__ is substituted with
LITELLM_MASTER_KEY from .env at install time. Your previous file is backed up first.
Chat/edit models go through the LiteLLM proxy (localhost:4000); the persona is
injected server-side by the persona_injector hook, so no per-model systemMessage.
Tab autocomplete points DIRECTLY at Ollama (localhost:11434) with a small FIM model —
fill-in-the-middle through the OpenAI-compat proxy is unreliable (continuedev/continue#2907).
Roles: coder-main | coder-agent | deep-think | deep-think-more | supervisor
